modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Web form on USD website is not submitting properly

full_description_text: So, I was trying to fill out this form on the USD website, you know, the public one, and it just wouldn’t work! Every time I hit submit, I got this weird error saying something about loading content and that element DDN_SITE2 is undefined or something like that. It’s super frustrating because I really need to change a part of the form, but it just keeps failing on me. Can someone please look into this?
short_description: Web form on USD website is not submitting properly
description: So, I was trying to fill out this form on the USD website, you know, the public one, and it just wouldn’t work! Every time I hit submit, I got this weird error saying something about loading content and that element DDN_SITE2 is undefined or something like that. It’s super frustrating because I really need to change a part of the form, but it just keeps failing on me. Can someone please look into this?
